# ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ · language/en.yml # Edit freely and run /fpp reload to apply changes without restarting. # # Colour format: MiniMessage tags # Named : <red>, <gray>, <white>, <dark_gray>, <yellow> … # Hex : <#0079FF>text</#0079FF> # Style : <bold>, <italic>, <underlined>, <strikethrough> # Reset : <reset> # Placeholders: {placeholder} — see each section for available ones # # ⚠ Keys marked "INTERNAL" are used by the layout engine. # You may adjust colours/characters but keep the key names intact. # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# ── Plugin prefix — prepended to all [FPP] messages ────────────────────────── # Feel free to change the colour/text, but keep it short. prefix: "<dark_gray>[<#0079FF>ꜰᴘᴘ</#0079FF><dark_gray>]<reset> "
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 1 · INTERNAL LAYOUT — do not remove or rename these keys # You may adjust colours/characters but keep the structure intact. # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Horizontal rule used in headers and footers divider: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"
# Help menu (placeholders {cmd}, {args}, {desc} required) help-header: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st> <#0079FF><bold>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ</#0079FF> <dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━</st>" help-entry: " <#0079FF>/{cmd}</#0079FF><gray> {args} <dark_gray>— <white>{desc}" help-footer: "<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"
# Plugin info screen (/fpp bare) — header line info-screen-header: " <#0079FF><bold>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴘʟᴜɢɪɴ</#0079FF> <dark_gray>· <gray>ꜰᴘᴘ"
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 2 · GENERIC ERRORS # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {0} — the root command name (e.g. "fpp") no-permission: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ᴘᴇʀᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴏ ᴛʜɪꜱ." unknown-command: "{prefix}<red>ᴜɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ ꜱᴜʙ-ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ. <gray>ᴛʀʏ <#0079FF>/{0} ʜᴇʟᴘ</#0079FF><gray> ꜰᴏʀ ᴀ ʟɪꜱᴛ." player-only: "{prefix}<red>ᴏɴʟʏ ᴀ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴄᴀɴ ʀᴜɴ ᴛʜɪꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ." invalid-number: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ɴᴜᴍʙᴇʀ. ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴇɴᴛᴇʀ ᴀ ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴠᴇ ɪɴᴛᴇɢᴇʀ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 3 · SPAWNING # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ── Spawn results ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {count} — bots spawned | {total} — total active | {name} — bot name # {max} — global cap | {limit} — personal limit spawn-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ꜱᴜᴍᴍᴏɴᴇᴅ<gray>. <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{total}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ<dark_gray>)" spawn-max-reached: "{prefix}<red>ᴍᴀx ʙᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛ ʀᴇᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{max}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛꜱ<dark_gray>)<red>. ᴅᴇʟᴇᴛᴇ ꜱᴏᴍᴇ ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ." spawn-user-limit-reached: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ'ᴠᴇ ʀᴇᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀʟ ʙᴏᴛ ʟɪᴍɪᴛ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{limit}</#0079FF> <gray>ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ)<dark_gray>)<red>." spawn-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ. <gray>ᴛʀʏ <#0079FF>/fpp spawn [afk|pvp] [amount] [--name <name>]</#0079FF><gray>." spawn-invalid-name: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇ. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ <white>1–16 <gray>ᴄʜᴀʀꜱ <dark_gray>(<white>ʟᴇᴛᴛᴇʀꜱ<gray>, <white>ᴅɪɡɪᴛꜱ<gray>, <white>_<dark_gray>)<gray>." spawn-name-taken: "{prefix}<red>ᴀ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name} <red>ɪꜱ ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." spawn-no-names-left: "{prefix}<red>ᴀʟʟ ɴᴀᴍᴇꜱ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴘᴏᴏʟ ᴀʀᴇ ɪɴ ᴜꜱᴇ. <gray>ʀᴇᴅᴜᴄᴇ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴏʀ ᴀᴅᴅ ᴍᴏʀᴇ ɴᴀᴍᴇꜱ."
# ── Console / location errors ────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {world} — the world name that was not found spawn-console-no-world: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ ɪꜱ ʟᴏᴀᴅᴇᴅ — ᴄᴀɴɴᴏᴛ ᴅᴇᴛᴇʀᴍɪɴᴇ ᴀ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴ ʟᴏᴄᴀᴛɪᴏɴ." spawn-world-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ᴡᴏʀʟᴅ '<white>{world}<red>' ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ ᴏʀ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ʟᴏᴀᴅᴇᴅ." spawn-invalid-coords: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴄᴏᴏʀᴅɪɴᴀᴛᴇꜱ. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ ꜰᴏʀᴍᴀᴛ: <white>x,y,z <gray><dark_gray>(ᴇ.ɢ. <white>100,64,200<gray>)"
# ── PVP bot ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {bot} — number of bots | {player} — target player name pvp-bot-target-set: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{bot}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴘᴠᴘ ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴡɪʟʟ <red>ʜᴜɴᴛ <white>{player}<gray>." player-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ <white>{player} <red>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ."
# ── Spawn cooldown ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {seconds} — seconds remaining spawn-cooldown: "{prefix}<red>ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴡᴀɪᴛ <white>{seconds}s<red> ʙᴇꜰᴏʀᴇ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴɪɴɢ ᴀɡᴀɪɴ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 4 · DELETE # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {name} — bot name | {count} — bots deleted delete-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>." delete-all: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>." delete-none: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ." delete-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red> ᴡᴀꜱ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ." # {count} — number of bots randomly despawned delete-random-success: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ(ꜱ) <white>ᴅɪꜱᴄᴏɴɴᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ<gray>."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 5 · LIST # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
list-none: " <gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 6 · BOT BROADCASTS # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {name} — bot display name (colours preserved — do not wrap in extra MiniMessage tags) bot-join: "{prefix}{name} <gray>ᴊᴏɪɴᴇᴅ ᴛʜᴇ ɢᴀᴍᴇ</gray>." bot-leave: "{prefix}{name} <gray>ʟᴇꜰᴛ ᴛʜᴇ ɢᴀᴍᴇ</gray>."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 7 · FAKE CHAT # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ── Global toggle ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── chat-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɪɴ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɪɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜰᴀᴋᴇ ᴄʜᴀᴛ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <on|off|status></#0079FF> <dark_gray>|</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> [on|off|say <msg>|tier <tier>]</#0079FF><gray>."
# ── Per-bot chat management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── # {name} — bot display name # {message} — message that was forced-sent # {tier} — activity tier name | {tiers} — valid tiers list # {seconds} — mute duration | {enabled} — enabled state | {multiplier} — tier multiplier chat-bot-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." chat-bot-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴄʜᴀᴛ ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴄʜᴀᴛ ɪꜱ <white>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴡɪʟʟ <white>ɴᴏᴡ ᴄʜᴀᴛ<gray>." chat-bot-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɪɴ <white>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-said: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜱᴀɪᴅ: <white>{message}" chat-bot-info: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ: <white>{enabled} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛɪᴇʀ: <white>{tier} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴍᴜʟᴛ: <white>{multiplier}×" chat-bot-muted: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɪɴ <white>ᴘᴇʀᴍᴀɴᴇɴᴛʟʏ ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-bot-muted-timed: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <white>{seconds}ꜱ<gray>." chat-mute-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> mute [seconds]</#0079FF><gray>." chat-bot-tier-set: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>'ꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>{tier}<gray>." chat-bot-tier-reset: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>'ꜱ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ʀᴇꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ<gray>." chat-bot-tier-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ᴛɪᴇʀ '<white>{tier}<red>'. <gray>ᴜꜱᴇ: <white>{tiers}<gray>." chat-say-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> say <message></#0079FF><gray>." chat-tier-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat <bot> tier <quiet|passive|normal|active|chatty|reset></#0079FF><gray>."
# ── Bulk bot chat (/fpp chat all …) ─────────────────────────────────────────── # {count} — bots affected | {enabled}/{disabled} — status counts # {tier} — tier name | {message} — message text chat-all-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat all <on|off|status|say <msg>|tier <tier>></#0079FF><gray>." chat-all-say-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp chat all say <message></#0079FF><gray>." chat-all-enabled: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ <white>{count}<gray> ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ᴡɪʟʟ <white>ɴᴏᴡ ᴄʜᴀᴛ<gray>." chat-all-disabled: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ <white>{count}<gray> ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ) ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɪɴ <white>ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ<gray>." chat-all-status: "{prefix}<gray>ᴄʜᴀᴛ ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ: <white>{enabled}<gray> | ꜱɪʟᴇɴᴄᴇᴅ: <white>{disabled}<gray>." chat-all-said: "{prefix}<gray>ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇ ꜱᴇɴᴛ ᴛʜʀᴏᴜɢʜ <white>{count}<gray> ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ): <white>{message}" chat-all-tier-set: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ ʙᴏᴛꜱ' ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>{tier}<gray>." chat-all-tier-reset: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ ʙᴏᴛꜱ' ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠɪᴛʏ ᴛɪᴇʀ ʀᴇꜱᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ <white>ʀᴀɴᴅᴏᴍ<gray>."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 8 · INFO / DATABASE # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {name} — bot or spawner name queried info-no-records: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʀᴇᴄᴏʀᴅꜱ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <white>{name}<red>." info-db-unavailable: "{prefix}<red>ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ ᴜɴᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ. ᴄʜᴇᴄᴋ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ᴀɴᴅ ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀ ʟᴏɡꜱ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 9 · TELEPORT # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {name} — bot name tph-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴛᴇʟᴇᴘᴏʀᴛᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ʏᴏᴜ." tph-no-bots: "{prefix}<red>ʏᴏᴜ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 10 · XP COMMAND # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {name} — bot name | {xp} — XP points collected | {seconds} — cooldown duration xp-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." xp-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴄᴏʟʟᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{xp}</#0079FF> <gray>xᴘ ꜰʀᴏᴍ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>. <dark_gray>ᴛʜᴇʏ ᴄᴀɴɴᴏᴛ ᴘɪᴄᴋ ᴜᴘ xᴘ ꜰᴏʀ {seconds}ꜱ." xp-no-xp: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ɴᴏ xᴘ." xp-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp xp <bot></#0079FF><gray>." xp-cooldown-active: "{prefix}<red><white>{name}<red> ᴄᴀɴɴᴏᴛ ᴘɪᴄᴋ ᴜᴘ xᴘ ꜰᴏʀ ᴀɴᴏᴛʜᴇʀ <white>{seconds}<red>ꜱ." xp-disabled: "{prefix}<red>xᴘ ꜱʏꜱᴛᴇᴍ ɪꜱ ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ ɪɴ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 11 · RANK (LuckPerms group assignment) # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {bot} — bot display name | {group} — LuckPerms group | {count} — bots assigned rank-no-luckperms: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ɪɴꜱᴛᴀʟʟᴇᴅ ᴏʀ ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ." rank-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp rank <bot> <group|clear></#0079FF><gray> <dark_gray>|</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp rank random <group> [num]</#0079FF><gray> <dark_gray>|</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp rank list</#0079FF><gray>." rank-bot-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." rank-group-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ʟᴜᴄᴋᴘᴇʀᴍꜱ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ <white>{group}<red> ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 12 · ALERT (cross-server broadcast) # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {message} — the alert text alert-received: "{prefix}<red><bold>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ<reset> <dark_gray>» <white>{message}" alert-sent: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴀʟᴇʀᴛ ʙʀᴏᴀᴅᴄᴀꜱᴛᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ꜱᴇʀᴠᴇʀꜱ</#0079FF><gray>." alert-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp alert <message></#0079FF><gray>."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 13 · SYNC (config synchronisation) # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {file} — config file name | {count} — files with local changes sync-not-available: "{prefix}<red>ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜱʏɴᴄ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ <dark_gray>(ɴᴇᴛᴡᴏʀᴋ ᴍᴏᴅᴇ ᴏɴʟʏ<dark_gray>)<red>." sync-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp sync <push|pull|check|status> [file]</#0079FF><gray>." sync-push-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜꜱʜᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-push-failed: "{prefix}<red>ꜰᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ᴘᴜꜱʜ <white>{file}<red> ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-push-all-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜꜱʜᴇᴅ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜʟʟᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-failed: "{prefix}<red>ꜰᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ᴘᴜʟʟ <white>{file}<red> ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-all-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴘᴜʟʟᴇᴅ <#0079FF>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-pull-no-updates: "{prefix}<gray>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ᴜᴘ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴇ." sync-pull-reload-hint: "{prefix}<gray>ʀᴜɴ <#0079FF>/fpp reload</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏ ᴀᴘᴘʟʏ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇꜱ." sync-check-has-changes: "{prefix}<yellow>⚠<reset> <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʟᴏᴄᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇꜱ <dark_gray>(ᴅɪꜰꜰᴇʀᴇɴᴛ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ<dark_gray>)." sync-check-no-changes: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{file}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ᴜᴘ ᴛᴏ ᴅᴀᴛᴇ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-check-all-clean: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <gray>ᴀʟʟ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡ ꜰɪʟᴇꜱ ꜱʏɴᴄʜʀᴏɴɪᴢᴇᴅ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴅᴀᴛᴀʙᴀꜱᴇ." sync-check-summary: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱʏɴᴄ ꜱᴛᴀᴛᴜꜱ: <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> <gray>ꜰɪʟᴇ(ꜱ) ᴡɪᴛʜ ʟᴏᴄᴀʟ ᴄʜᴀɴɢᴇꜱ." sync-status-no-network: "{prefix}<red>ꜱʏɴᴄ ɪꜱ ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ <dark_gray>(ɴᴏᴛ ɪɴ ɴᴇᴛᴡᴏʀᴋ ᴍᴏᴅᴇ<dark_gray>)<red>."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 14 · SWAP (session rotation) # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {sessions} — active session timers | {offline} — bots waiting to rejoin # {name} — bot name | {count} — bot count # {next} — time until next swap | {min} — min-online floor # {personality} — bot personality | {swaps} — swap cycle count # {time} — time remaining in session swap-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɪɴ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ʜᴀꜱ ʙᴇᴇɪɴ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜱᴇꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ: <#0079FF>{sessions}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴏꜰꜰʟɪɴᴇ: <#0079FF>{offline}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ɴᴇxᴛ: <#0079FF>{next}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴍɪɴ: <#0079FF>{min}</#0079FF>" swap-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ꜱᴇꜱɪᴏɴ ʀᴏᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." swap-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp swap</#0079FF> <dark_gray>[<gray>ᴛᴏɢɢʟᴇ<dark_gray>]</dark_gray> <dark_gray>│</dark_gray> <#0079FF>/fpp swap <on|off|status|now <bot>|list|info <bot>></#0079FF><gray>." swap-now-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp swap now <bot></#0079FF><gray>." swap-not-available: "{prefix}<red>ꜱᴡᴀᴘ ꜱʏꜱᴛᴇᴍ ɴᴏᴛ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ." swap-now-success: "{prefix}<#66CC66>✓</#66CC66> <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ ʟᴇᴀᴠɪɴɢ<gray>." swap-now-failed: "{prefix}<red>ꜰᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ ᴏᴜᴛ <white>{name}<red>." swap-list-empty: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ꜱᴄʜᴇᴅᴜʟᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ ꜱᴡᴀᴘ." swap-list-header: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱᴄʜᴇᴅᴜʟᴇᴅ ʙᴏᴛꜱ<gray>: <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF>" swap-list-entry: " <dark_gray>• <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>{personality} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴄʏᴄʟᴇꜱ: <white>{swaps} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ʟᴇᴀᴠᴇꜱ: <white>{time}" swap-info-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp swap info <bot></#0079FF><gray>." swap-info-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." swap-info: "{prefix}<#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀʟɪᴛʏ: <white>{personality} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴄʏᴄʟᴇꜱ: <white>{swaps} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ʟᴇᴀᴠᴇꜱ ɪɴ: <white>{time} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴏꜰꜰʟɪɴᴇ ᴡᴀɪᴛɪɴɢ: <white>{offline}"
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 15 · PEAK HOURS (time-based bot pool scheduling) # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {window} — active time window label (e.g. 18:00–22:00) # {fraction} — current target fraction as a % (e.g. 75%) # {target} — target number of bots online # {online} — AFK bots currently online # {swapping} — bots temporarily offline via BotSwapAI session rotation # {sleeping} — bots currently sleeping in the peak-hours pool # {total} — total pool size (online + sleeping + swapping) # {time} — human-readable time until next window (e.g. 1h 20m) # {next_fraction}— fraction of the next window (e.g. 5%) # {count} — number of sleeping bots | {name} — bot name # {timezone} — configured timezone string peaks-enabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴇɴᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." peaks-disabled: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ — ᴀʟʟ ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴡᴏᴋᴇɴ<gray>." peaks-status-on: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ: <white>{window} <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜰʀᴀᴄᴛɪᴏɴ: <#0079FF>{fraction}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛᴀʀɡᴇᴛ: <#0079FF>{target}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ: <#0079FF>{online}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜱᴡᴀᴘᴘɪɴɢ: <#0079FF>{swapping}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ: <#0079FF>{sleeping}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛᴏᴛᴀʟ: <#0079FF>{total}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>│ <gray>ᴛᴢ: <white>{timezone}" peaks-status-off: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ <white>ᴅɪꜱᴀʙʟᴇᴅ<gray>." peaks-next-window: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴇxᴛ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ ɪɴ <#0079FF>{time}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>→ <#0079FF>{next_fraction}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴏꜱ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ<gray>." peaks-no-windows: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡꜱ ᴄᴏɴꜰɪɡᴜʀᴇᴅ — ᴇᴅɪᴛ <white>peak-hours.schedule<gray> ɪɴ config.yml." peaks-requires-swap: "{prefix}<red>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇꜱ <white>swap.enabled: true<red>. ʀᴜɴ <white>/fpp swap on<red> ꜰɪʀꜱᴛ." peaks-invalid: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp peaks <on|off|status|next|force|list|wake|sleep></#0079FF><gray>." peaks-force-check: "{prefix}<gray>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ-ʜᴏᴜʀꜱ ᴇᴠᴀʟᴜᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴛʀɪɡɡᴇʀᴇᴅ." peaks-list-header: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ ʙᴏᴛꜱ <dark_gray>(<#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF>)<gray>:" peaks-list-entry: " <dark_gray>┃ <white>{name} <dark_gray>@ <gray>{world} <dark_gray>[<gray>{x}<dark_gray>, <gray>{y}<dark_gray>, <gray>{z}<dark_gray>]" peaks-list-empty: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ." peaks-wake-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴏᴋᴇ <white>{name}<gray>." peaks-wake-all: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴏᴋᴇ <#0079FF>{count}</#0079FF> ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘɪɴɢ ʙᴏᴛ(ꜱ)." peaks-sleep-success: "{prefix}<gray>ᴘᴜᴛ <white>{name}<gray> ᴛᴏ ꜱʟᴇᴇᴘ." peaks-sleep-failed: "{prefix}<red>ʙᴏᴛ '<white>{name}<red>' ɴᴏᴛ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ ᴏʀ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇʟɪɡɪʙʟᴇ." peaks-transition: "{prefix}<#0079FF>ᴘᴇᴀᴋ ᴡɪɴᴅᴏᴡ</#0079FF><gray>: <white>{window} <dark_gray>({fraction} <gray>ᴏꜱ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ<dark_gray>)<gray>."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 15.5 · MOVE COMMAND (bot navigation to a player) # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {name} — bot display name # {player} — target player name # {count} — waypoint count / index number # {num} — 1-based waypoint index # {x},{y},{z},{world} — waypoint coordinates move-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp move <bot> <player></#0079FF> <gray>ᴏʀ <#0079FF>/fpp move <bot> --wp <route>|--stop</#0079FF><gray>." move-bot-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." move-bot-not-online: "{prefix}<red>ʙᴏᴛ <white>{name}<red> ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴏɴʟɪɴᴇ ᴏʀ ʜᴀꜱ ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴅʏ." move-navigating: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴀᴠɪɢᴀᴛɪɴɢ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ᴛᴏᴡᴀʀᴅ <white>{player}<gray>." move-different-world: "{prefix}<red><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <red>ᴀɴᴅ <white>{player}<red> ᴀʀᴇ ɪɴ ᴅɪꜰꜰᴇʀᴇɴᴛ ᴡᴏʀʟᴅꜱ." # patrol / waypoint messages move-setpos-added: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛ <white>#{count}</white> <gray>ꜱᴀᴠᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>." move-setpos-player-only: "{prefix}<red>--ꜱᴇᴛᴘᴏꜱ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇꜱ ᴀ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴛᴏ ᴄᴀᴘᴛᴜʀᴇ ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴏɴ." move-clearpos: "{prefix}<gray>ᴄʟᴇᴀʀᴇᴅ ᴀʟʟ ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛꜱ ꜰᴏʀ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>." move-clearpos-empty: "{prefix}<red><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <red>ʜᴀꜱ ɴᴏ ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛꜱ ꜱᴇᴛ." move-patrol-started: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ ᴘᴀᴛʀᴏʟʟɪɴɢ <white>{count}</white> <gray>ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛꜱ ɪɴ ᴀ ʟᴏᴏᴘ." move-no-waypoints: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛꜱ ꜱᴇᴛ ꜰᴏʀ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><red>. ᴜꜱᴇ <white>/fpp move {name} --setpos</white> ᴛᴏ ᴀᴅᴅ ᴏɴᴇ." move-listpos-header: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛꜱ ꜰᴏʀ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>(<white>{count}</white>)<gray>:" move-listpos-entry: " <dark_gray>#{num} <white>{x}, {y}, {z} <gray>({world})" move-listpos-empty: "{prefix}<red><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <red>ʜᴀꜱ ɴᴏ ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛꜱ ꜱᴇᴛ." move-wp-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp move <bot> --wp <route></#0079FF><gray>." move-wp-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>. ᴜꜱᴇ <white>/fpp wp list</white> ᴛᴏ ꜱᴇᴇ ᴀʟʟ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇꜱ." move-wp-different-world: "{prefix}<red><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><red> ᴀɴᴅ ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛ <white>{waypoint}<red> ᴀʀᴇ ɪɴ ᴅɪꜰꜰᴇʀᴇɴᴛ ᴡᴏʀʟᴅꜱ." move-wp-started: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡ ᴘᴀᴛʀᴏʟʟɪɴɢ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ <#0079FF>{waypoint}</#0079FF><gray> (<white>{count}</white> ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴏɴꜱ)<gray>." move-stopped: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱᴛᴏᴘᴘᴇᴅ ɴᴀᴠɪɢᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ꜰᴏʀ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>." move-not-navigating: "{prefix}<red><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <red>ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ɴᴀᴠɪɢᴀᴛɪɴɢ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 15.6 · INVENTORY COMMAND (view/edit bot inventory) # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {name} — bot display name inv-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp inventory <bot></#0079FF><gray>." inv-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." inv-bodyless: "{prefix}<red><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <red>ʜᴀꜱ ɴᴏ ʙᴏᴅʏ <dark_gray>(ʙᴏᴅʏʟᴇꜱꜱ ʙᴏᴛ)<red>." inv-player-only: "{prefix}<red>ᴏɴʟʏ ᴀ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ᴄᴀɴ ᴏᴘᴇɴ ᴀɴ ɪɴᴠᴇɴᴛᴏʀʏ." inv-opened: "{prefix}<gray>ᴏᴘᴇɴᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>'ꜱ ɪɴᴠᴇɴᴛᴏʀʏ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 15.7 · CMD COMMAND (execute command as bot) # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {name} — bot display name | {cmd} — command string (with leading /) cmd-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp cmd <bot> <command...></#0079FF><gray> ᴏʀ <#0079FF>/fpp cmd <bot> --add <command...></#0079FF><gray>." cmd-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ʙᴏᴛ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." cmd-bot-offline: "{prefix}<red><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><red> ʜᴀꜱ ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ʙᴏᴅʏ." cmd-executed: "{prefix}<gray>ᴇxᴇᴄᴜᴛᴇᴅ <#0079FF>{cmd}</#0079FF><gray> ᴀꜱ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>." cmd-failed: "{prefix}<red>ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ <white>{cmd}<red> ᴅɪᴅ ɴᴏᴛ ʀᴇᴛᴜʀɴ ꜱᴜᴄᴄᴇꜱꜱ ꜰᴏʀ <white>{name}<red>." # --add / --clear / --show feedback cmd-add-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp cmd <bot> --add <command...></#0079FF><gray>." cmd-add-set: "{prefix}<gray>ʀɪɢʜᴛ-ᴄʟɪᴄᴋ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ ꜱᴇᴛ ᴏɴ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>: <white>{cmd}<gray>." cmd-add-updated: "{prefix}<gray>ʀɪɢʜᴛ-ᴄʟɪᴄᴋ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ ᴜᴘᴅᴀᴛᴇᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>: <red>{old}</red> <dark_gray>→ <white>{cmd}<gray>." cmd-add-cleared: "{prefix}<gray>ʀɪɢʜᴛ-ᴄʟɪᴄᴋ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ ᴄʟᴇᴀʀᴇᴅ ꜰʀᴏᴍ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>." cmd-add-none: "{prefix}<gray>ɴᴏ ʀɪɢʜᴛ-ᴄʟɪᴄᴋ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ ɪꜱ ꜱᴇᴛ ᴏɴ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>." cmd-add-show: "{prefix}<gray>ʀɪɢʜᴛ-ᴄʟɪᴄᴋ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴀɴᴅ ꜰᴏʀ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>: <white>{cmd}<gray>."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 15 · MINE COMMAND # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# /fpp mine <bot> [once|stop] | /fpp mine stop mine-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp mine <bot> [once|stop]</#0079FF><gray> | <#0079FF>/fpp mine stop</#0079FF><gray>." mine-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ʙᴏᴛ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><red> ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ." mine-bot-offline: "{prefix}<red><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><red> ʜᴀꜱ ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ʙᴏᴅʏ." mine-walking: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ɪꜱ ᴡᴀʟᴋɪɴɢ ᴛᴏ ᴍɪɴɪɴɢ ꜱᴘᴏᴛ..." mine-started: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ꜱᴛᴀʀᴛᴇᴅ ᴍɪɴɪɴɢ ᴄᴏɴᴛɪɴᴜᴏᴜꜱʟʏ." mine-started-once: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ᴍɪɴɪɴɢ ᴏɴᴇ ʙʟᴏᴄᴋ..." mine-stopped: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ꜱᴛᴏᴘᴘᴇᴅ ᴍɪɴɪɴɢ." mine-stopped-all: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱᴛᴏᴘᴘᴇᴅ ᴀʟʟ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴍɪɴɪɴɢ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 16 · USE COMMAND # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# /fpp use <bot> [once|stop] | /fpp use stop use-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp use <bot> [once|stop]</#0079FF><gray> | <#0079FF>/fpp use stop</#0079FF><gray>." use-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ʙᴏᴛ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><red> ᴅᴏᴇꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴇxɪꜱᴛ." use-bot-offline: "{prefix}<red><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><red> ʜᴀꜱ ɴᴏ ᴀᴄᴛɪᴠᴇ ᴘʟᴀʏᴇʀ ʙᴏᴅʏ." use-walking: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ɪꜱ ᴡᴀʟᴋɪɴɢ ᴛᴏ ᴜꜱᴇ ꜱᴘᴏᴛ..." use-started: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ꜱᴛᴀʀᴛᴇᴅ ʀɪɢʜᴛ-ᴄʟɪᴄᴋɪɴɢ ᴄᴏɴᴛɪɴᴜᴏᴜꜱʟʏ." use-started-once: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ʀɪɢʜᴛ-ᴄʟɪᴄᴋɪɴɢ ᴏɴᴄᴇ..." use-stopped: "{prefix}<gray><#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ꜱᴛᴏᴘᴘᴇᴅ ʀɪɢʜᴛ-ᴄʟɪᴄᴋɪɴɢ." use-stopped-all: "{prefix}<gray>ꜱᴛᴏᴘᴘᴇᴅ ᴀʟʟ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ʀɪɢʜᴛ-ᴄʟɪᴄᴋɪɴɢ."
# ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ # 17.5 · WAYPOINT COMMAND (/fpp waypoint alias /fpp wp) # ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# {name} — route name # {index} — 1-based position index / new total count after add # {count} — number of positions in route / number of routes # {num} — 1-based entry number in a list # {x},{y},{z},{world} — position coordinates wp-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp wp add <route></#0079FF> <gray>| <#0079FF>remove <route> <index></#0079FF> <gray>| <#0079FF>delete <route></#0079FF> <gray>| <#0079FF>clear <route></#0079FF> <gray>| <#0079FF>list [route]</#0079FF><gray>." wp-add-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp wp add <route></#0079FF><gray>." wp-remove-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp wp remove <route> <index></#0079FF><gray>." wp-delete-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp wp delete <route></#0079FF><gray>." wp-clear-usage: "{prefix}<red>ᴜꜱᴀɢᴇ<gray>: <#0079FF>/fpp wp clear <route></#0079FF><gray>." wp-invalid-name: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ ɴᴀᴍᴇ <white>{name}<red>. ᴜꜱᴇ ʟᴇᴛᴛᴇʀꜱ, 0-9, _, - ᴏɴʟʏ." wp-not-found: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ ɴᴀᴍᴇᴅ <white>{name}<red>." wp-invalid-index: "{prefix}<red><white>{input}<red> ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴀ ᴠᴀʟɪᴅ ɪɴᴅᴇx. ᴜꜱᴇ ᴀ ɴᴜᴍʙᴇʀ ꜱᴛᴀʀᴛɪɴɢ ꜰʀᴏᴍ 1." wp-index-out-of-range: "{prefix}<red>ɪɴᴅᴇx <white>{index}<red> ɪꜱ ᴏᴜᴛ ᴏꜰ ʀᴀɴɢᴇ ꜰᴏʀ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>(<white>{count}</white> ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴏɴ(ꜱ)<dark_gray>)<red>." wp-pos-added: "{prefix}<gray>ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴏɴ <white>#{index}</white> <gray>ᴀᴅᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>: <dark_gray>{x}, {y}, {z}<gray>." wp-pos-removed: "{prefix}<gray>ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴏɴ <white>#{index}</white> <gray>ʀᴇᴍᴏᴠᴇᴅ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>." wp-deleted: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray> ᴅᴇʟᴇᴛᴇᴅ." wp-cleared: "{prefix}<gray>ᴄʟᴇᴀʀᴇᴅ ᴀʟʟ ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF><gray>." wp-list-empty: "{prefix}<red>ɴᴏ ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇꜱ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴᴇᴅ. ᴜꜱᴇ <white>/fpp wp add <route></white> ᴛᴏ ᴄʀᴇᴀᴛᴇ ᴏɴᴇ." wp-list-header: "{prefix}<gray>ᴡᴀʏᴘᴏɪɴᴛ ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇꜱ <dark_gray>(<white>{count}</white>)<gray>:" wp-list-entry: " <dark_gray>#{num} <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <dark_gray>(<white>{count}</white> <gray>ᴘᴏꜱ<dark_gray>)" wp-route-header: "{prefix}<gray>ʀᴏᴜᴛᴇ <#0079FF>{name}</#0079FF> <gray>(<white>{count}</white> ᴘᴏꜱɪᴛɪᴏɴ(ꜱ))<gray>:" wp-route-entry: " <dark_gray>#{num} <white>{x}, {y}, {z} <gray>({world})"

(Supported: up to <white>MC 1.21.11<red>)\n <gray>All /fpp commands have been disabled until an update is released.\n <gray>If you think this is a bug, contact us: <click:open_url:'https://discord.gg/RfjEJDG2TM'><#0079FF><underlined>Discord</underlined></#0079FF></click><gray>.\n<dark_gray><st>━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━</st>"

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: FakePlayerPlugin version: '1.3.0' main: me.bill.fakePlayerPlugin.FakePlayerPlugin api-version: '1.21' authors: [ El_Pepes ] description: Advanced Fake Player Spoofer for Paper 1.21+ | Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/plugin/fake-player-plugin-(fpp) softdepend: [ PlaceholderAPI, LuckPerms ]
commands: fpp: description: Fake Player Plugin main command usage: /fpp [sub-command] aliases: [ fakeplayer, fp ]
permissions:
# ── Admin wildcard ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Grants EVERYTHING — assign to owner / admin groups only. fpp.*: description: Grants access to all FPP commands and features (admin). default: op children: fpp.help: true fpp.spawn: true fpp.spawn.multiple: true fpp.spawn.name: true fpp.delete: true fpp.delete.all: true fpp.list: true fpp.chat: true fpp.swap: true fpp.reload: true fpp.info: true fpp.tp: true fpp.bypass.maxbots: true fpp.bypass.cooldown: true fpp.admin.migrate: true fpp.stats: true fpp.freeze: true fpp.user.*: true
# ── User wildcard ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # default: true → ALL players get user-tier access out of the box. # Use LuckPerms to negate it for specific groups if needed: # /lp group guest permission set fpp.user.* false fpp.user.*: description: > Grants all user-facing FPP commands to regular players (default: everyone). Includes: spawn (1-bot limit), /fpp tph, /fpp info (own bots only). Does NOT include admin commands (delete, reload, swap, chat, list, full-info, tp). default: true children: fpp.user.spawn: true fpp.user.tph: true fpp.user.info: true fpp.bot.1: true # default personal limit — 1 bot per player
# ── User commands ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fpp.user.spawn: description: > Spawn bots up to the player's personal bot limit. Limit is resolved from fpp.bot.<num> nodes (highest wins). Falls back to fake-player.user-bot-limit in config.yml (default: 1). Cannot use --name or spawn multiple bots (admin-only features). default: true
fpp.user.tph: description: > Teleport your own bot(s) to you with /fpp tph [botname]. Players can only tph bots they personally spawned. If you have 1 bot, botname is optional. If you have multiple bots, you must specify one by name. default: true
fpp.user.info: description: > View limited bot info with /fpp info [botname] — own bots only. Shows: world, coordinates, uptime. Does NOT show session history, database records, or other players' bots. default: true
# ── Bot limit nodes ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Assign the highest node the player should be allowed. # The plugin scans fpp.bot.1 → fpp.bot.100 and picks the highest match. # fpp.bot.1 is already included in fpp.user.* (1-bot default for all players). fpp.bot.1: description: Personal bot limit — 1 active bot at a time. Included in fpp.user.*. default: false # granted automatically via fpp.user.* (default: true) fpp.bot.2: description: Personal bot limit — 2 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.3: description: Personal bot limit — 3 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.5: description: Personal bot limit — 5 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.10: description: Personal bot limit — 10 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.15: description: Personal bot limit — 15 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.20: description: Personal bot limit — 20 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.50: description: Personal bot limit — 50 active bots at a time. default: false fpp.bot.100: description: Personal bot limit — 100 active bots at a time. default: false
# ── Help ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.help: description: View the /fpp help menu. Granted to everyone by default. default: true
# ── Spawn (admin) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Admin spawn ignores personal bot limits entirely. fpp.spawn: description: > Admin spawn — /fpp spawn [amount] [--name <name>]. No personal bot limit. Automatically grants fpp.spawn.multiple and fpp.spawn.name. default: op children: fpp.spawn.multiple: true fpp.spawn.name: true
fpp.spawn.multiple: description: > Spawn more than one bot at a time (/fpp spawn <amount>). Negate to restrict a group to single-bot spawning even with fpp.spawn. default: op
fpp.spawn.name: description: > Use the --name flag to spawn a bot with a custom name. User-tier (fpp.user.spawn) cannot use this — admin only. default: op
# ── Delete ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.delete: description: Delete a fake player by name with /fpp delete <name>. default: op children: fpp.delete.all: true
fpp.delete.all: description: > Delete ALL bots at once with /fpp delete all. Negate to allow individual deletions without mass-wipe access. default: op
# ── List ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.list: description: List all active bots (name, uptime, location, spawner) with /fpp list. default: op
# ── Chat ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.chat: description: Toggle bot fake-chat on/off with /fpp chat [on|off|status]. default: op
# ── Swap ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.swap: description: Toggle the bot swap/rotation system with /fpp swap [on|off|status]. default: op
# ── Reload ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.reload: description: Hot-reload all plugin config with /fpp reload. Restrict to trusted admins. default: op
# ── Info (admin) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.info: description: > Full admin database query via /fpp info / /fpp info bot <name> / /fpp info spawner <name>. Shows session history, timestamps, locations, and removal reasons for ALL bots. default: op
# ── Teleport ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.tp: description: > Teleport yourself to any active bot with /fpp tp [botname]. Admin-only. User-tier players cannot use this — grant explicitly if needed. default: op
# ── Bypass ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.bypass.maxbots: description: > Bypass the global max-bots cap in config.yml during /fpp spawn. Grant with care — no upper bound when active. default: op
# ── Migration & Backup ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.admin.migrate: description: > Access /fpp migrate — create backups, run config migrations, merge old databases, export session data to CSV, and migrate between SQLite and MySQL backends. Op-only by default. Grant only to trusted server administrators. default: op
# ── Stats ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.stats: description: > View the /fpp stats panel showing live bot counts, system status, database lifetime statistics, and server TPS. default: op
# ── Freeze ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.freeze: description: > Freeze or unfreeze bots with /fpp freeze <bot|all> [on|off]. Frozen bots are immovable and shown with an ❄ indicator in /fpp list. default: op
# ── Bypass cooldown ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.bypass.cooldown: description: > Bypass the spawn-cooldown delay for /fpp spawn. Automatically granted to admins via fpp.*. default: op

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:

# ── Stats ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.stats: description: > View the /fpp stats panel showing live bot counts, system status, database lifetime statistics, and server TPS. default: op
# ── Freeze ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.freeze: description: > Freeze or unfreeze bots with /fpp freeze <bot|all> [on|off]. Frozen bots are immovable and shown with an ❄ indicator in /fpp list. default: op
# ── Bypass cooldown ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── fpp.bypass.cooldown: description: > Bypass the spawn-cooldown delay for /fpp spawn. Automatically granted to admins via fpp.*. default: op

option.name: filePath
option.value: /pom (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd"> <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
<groupId>me.bill.fakePlayerPlugin</groupId> <artifactId>fpp-velocity</artifactId> <version>1.6.6.1</version> <packaging>jar</packaging>
<properties> <java.version>17</java.version> <maven.compiler.release>${java.version}</maven.compiler.release> <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding> </properties>
<repositories> <repository> <id>velocity</id> <url>https://repo.papermc.io/repository/maven-public/</url> </repository> </repositories>
<dependencies> <!-- Velocity API --> <dependency> <groupId>com.velocitypowered</groupId> <artifactId>velocity-api</artifactId> <version>3.3.0-SNAPSHOT</version> <scope>provided</scope> </dependency> </dependencies>
<build> <finalName>fpp-velocity-${project.version}</finalName> <plugins> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.13.0</version> <configuration> <annotationProcessorPaths> <!-- Velocity annotation processor generates velocity-plugin.json --> <path> <groupId>com.velocitypowered</groupId> <artifactId>velocity-api</artifactId> <version>3.3.0-SNAPSHOT</version> </path> </annotationProcessorPaths> </configuration> </plugin> <plugin> <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>maven-jar-plugin</artifactId> <version>3.3.0</version> </plugin> </plugins> </build> </project>
